name: Funderpro
description: Comprehensive prop-firm forensic dossier based on legacy research archives.
fullReview:
# FunderPro - Deep Dive Extensive Report

## Company Background
- **Founding Year**: Not explicitly stated, but website indicates active since at least 2024
- **Company Name**: FunderPro
- **Ownership**: Not specified on website
- **Team**: Not specified
- **Global Reach**: Serves traders worldwide
- **Headquarters**: Not explicitly stated

## Regulation & Licensing
- **Regulatory Status**: Not explicitly stated on website
- **Legal Structure**: Not specified
- **Compliance**: Operates as a proprietary trading firm with simulated trading environment

## Challenge Rules & Phases
- **Evaluation Programs**: Three main challenge types
- **Structure**:
  - **1-Phase**: Single evaluation phase for expert traders (can be completed in 3 days)
  - **Pro**: Two-phase evaluation with daily/weekly reward options
  - **Classic**: Two-phase evaluation with no consistency rule, ideal for beginners
- **Instant Funding**: Skip evaluation and get funded immediately
- **Trading Objectives**: Must meet profit targets and risk parameters
- **Rules**: Comprehensive trading rules with daily drawdown limits, overall drawdown limits, consistency rules (for Pro), minimum trading days requirements

## Account Types & Pricing
- **Account Sizes**: $5,000 to $200,000 for challenges
- **Instant Funding**: $5,000 to $200,000
- **Pricing**:
  - 1-Phase: $69 to $989
  - Pro: $109 to $799
  - Classic: $75 to $989
  - Instant Funding: $111 to $2,752
- **Fee Structure**: Challenge fees are credited back with first reward
- **Refund Policy**: Fees are refundable with first payout

## Trading Conditions
- **Platforms**: MT5, cTrader, TradeLocker
- **Instruments**: Forex, Metals, Oil, Indices, Crypto, Stocks
- **Leverage**: 
  - Forex: Up to 1:100
  - Metals, Oil & Indices: Up to 1:30
  - Crypto: Up to 1:2
  - Stocks: Up to 1:5
- **Trading Style**: Supports EAs and bots, news trading allowed, weekend holding allowed

## Payouts & Profit Split
- **Profit Split**: Up to 90% for traders
- **Payout Frequency**: Daily, weekly, or bi-weekly options
- **Reward Frequency**: Multiple times per day possible
- **Reliability**: Strong track record with daily rewards
- **Processing**: Aims to process all rewards within 1 working day

## Scaling Plans
- **Scaling Potential**: Up to $5 million in trading capital
- **Growth Path**: Scale accounts based on performance
- **Programs**: Various challenge types to match trading styles
- **Consistency Rule**: For Pro accounts, best trading day earnings shouldn't exceed 40% of total profits

## User Reviews (Trustpilot Analysis)
- **Trustpilot Rating**: 4.8/5 (based on numerous positive reviews)
- **Positive Feedback**:
  - "Real daily rewards" - consistent and reliable payouts
  - "Excellent platform" - MT5, cTrader, and TradeLocker options
  - "Fast processing" - rewards processed within 1 working day
  - "EAs allowed" - automated trading supported
  - "No trailing drawdown" - fair risk management
  - "News trading allowed" - flexible trading strategies
  - "Professional support" - responsive customer service
- **Negative Feedback**:
  - "Platform glitches" - occasional technical issues reported
  - "Rule complexity" - some traders find rules challenging to understand
  - "Account access issues" - occasional login problems

## Competitive Position
- **Market Position**: Well-established prop firm with strong reputation
- **Unique Selling Points**:
  - Multiple platform options (MT5, cTrader, TradeLocker)
  - Daily rewards processing
  - EAs and bots allowed
  - No trailing drawdown
  - News trading allowed
  - Weekend holding allowed
  - Up to $5 million scaling potential
  - 25% discount offers available
- **Competition**: Competes with FTMO, The5ers, and other major prop firms

## Affiliate Program
- **Availability**: Not explicitly mentioned on website
- **Structure**: Not specified

## Payout Track Record
- **Reliability**: Strong track record with daily rewards
- **Processing Time**: Average 8 hours, maximum 1 business day
- **Consistency**: Reliable payout processing reported by traders
- **Proof**: Numerous payout certificates displayed on website

## Rules Transparency
- **Positive**: Comprehensive rules clearly displayed
- **Negative**: Some traders find rules complex
- **Areas for Improvement**: Better educational resources for rule understanding

## Partnerships & Sponsorships
- **Information Not Available**: No prominent partnerships mentioned

## Charity & CSR
- **Information Not Available**: No mention of charity initiatives

## Industry Awards
- **Information Not Available**: No industry awards mentioned

## Current Promotions
- **Discount Offers**: 25% off until 31st December
- **Special Programs**: Various challenge types with different pricing tiers

## Overall Assessment
FunderPro is a well-established and reputable prop trading firm with strong trader support, reliable daily rewards, and flexible trading conditions. While there are occasional technical issues, their overall reputation is excellent with comprehensive platform options and generous scaling potential.
